A single branche record — the table-level business term for the branches table.
A single employee record — the table-level business term for the employees table.
A single member record — the table-level business term for the members table.
A single account record — the table-level business term for the accounts table.
A single card record — the table-level business term for the cards table.
A single transaction record — the table-level business term for the transactions table.
A single loan record — the table-level business term for the loans table.
A single ach payment record — the table-level business term for the ach_payments table.
A single kyc review record — the table-level business term for the kyc_reviews table.
A single suspicious activity record — the table-level business term for the suspicious_activity table.
A single general ledger entry record — the table-level business term for the gl_entries table.
